assessment.note: Priya feels unchallenged and is not experiencing growth in her current tasks.

new_queue.label: Mentoring aspirations
new_queue.name: You've mentioned wanting to do more mentoring — what specific areas do you feel passionate about sharing with others?
new_queue.description: Explores their mentoring interests to clarify role alignment and growth opportunities.

new_queue.label: Upcoming billing rewrite
new_queue.name: What are your initial thoughts on the upcoming billing rewrite? Are there specific challenges or contributions you foresee?
new_queue.description: Gathers their insights on upcoming responsibilities and expectations for the billing rewrite.

new_queue.label: Energy levels
new_queue.name: How do you feel about your energy levels as we move toward the billing rewrite? Any concerns or adjustments needed?
new_queue.description: Seeks to assess their energy and motivation levels in light of upcoming changes.

new_queue.label: Recognizing contributions
new_queue.name: What aspect of the payments refactor are you most proud of, and how do you think it impacted the team?
new_queue.description: Encourages them to reflect on their personal contributions and the effect on team dynamics.
